design_decisions.description: ChatMessage → responses input mapping: convert []ChatMessage to /v1/responses input items internally; keep ChatMessage/ChatResponse canonical.
design_decisions.rationale: Local to OpenAIResponses struct; keeps agent loop unchanged. Reversible — could add a dedicated responses-message type later.

design_decisions.description: Temperature omitted from all responses-API requests. Reasoning models reject non-default; non-reasoning models accept default.
design_decisions.rationale: Narrow, request-shape decision. Reversible — could add a configurable temperature field later.

design_decisions.description: Cross-provider web_search tool backed by DuckDuckGo HTML lite (no API key). Takes a query, fetches lite.duckduckgo.com/lite/?q=…, returns truncated results.
design_decisions.rationale: Coach mandated web_search is mandatory (decline 2026-06-24). DDG lite satisfies spec's 'simple HTTP search' scope without API key dependency. Reversible — can swap backing to SerpAPI/Brave later.

design_decisions.description: No dedicated Agent interface for responses; OpenAIResponses implements both Verify (Verifier) and Chat (Agent) on the same struct, matching OAI pattern.
design_decisions.rationale: Matches existing pattern; OAI already carries both methods. Reversible — could extract a separate Agent interface later.

design_decisions.description: Pricing entries for gpt-5.5/gpt-5.5-pro/gpt-5.3-codex added to modelPricing in oai.go. Keys use bare model names (gpt-5.5, not openai-responses/gpt-5.5). /v1/responses usage field names (output_tokens, input_tokens) mapped to CompletionTokens, PromptTokens.
design_decisions.rationale: computeCost looks up by model name, not full model ID. Usage field mapping is local to OpenAIResponses response parsing.
